revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月十九]][[zh:正月十九]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 19|qq=January 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|qid=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin|1=Kōnin (era)}} 14th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|823|en|823|qid=Q29944|lt=823|1=823}} {{ill|March 5|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 5|qq=}}） – {{ill|Kūkai|en|Kūkai|qid=Q222227|lt=Kūkai|1=Kūkai}} is granted control of {{ill|Tō-ji|en|Tō-ji|qid=Q1046403|lt=Tō-ji|1=Tō-ji}} (Kyōō Gokoku-ji) in Kyoto. * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|qid=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1744|en|1744|qid=Q7583|lt=1744|1=1744}} {{ill|March 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 3|qq=}}） – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} issues an edict cracking down on fraudulent monks known as {{ill|komusō|en|komusō|qid=Q2386368|lt=komusō|1=Komusō}}. * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|February 10|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 10|qq=}}） – {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|en|Katsu Kaishū|qid=Q700470|lt=Katsu Kaishū|1=Katsu Kaishū}} and others depart from Shinagawa aboard the {{ill|Kanrin Maru|en|Kanrin Maru|qid=Q2698119|lt=Kanrin Maru|1=Kanrin Maru}}, heading for the U.S. to ratify the Treaty of Amity and Commerce. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|February 12|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 12|qq=}}） – {{ill|Ōkubo Toshimichi|en|Ōkubo Toshimichi|qid=Q356118|lt=Ōkubo Toshimichi|1=Ōkubo Toshimichi}} proposes relocating the capital to Osaka.
== Births == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1824|en|1824|qid=Q6994|lt=1824|1=1824}} {{ill|February 18|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 18|qq=}}） – {{ill|Kanenari Kizō|ja|金成喜蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanenari Kizō|1=Kizō Kannari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q128842733}}, businessman (d. {{ill|1912|en|1912|qid=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|February 17|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 17|qq=}}） – {{ill|Mori Ōgai|en|Mori Ōgai|qid=Q356960|lt=Mori Ōgai|1=Mori Ōgai}}, novelist, translator, and army surgeon (d. {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|qid=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|890|en|890|qid=Q30481|lt=890|1=890}} {{ill|February 12|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 12|qq=}}） – {{ill|Henjō|en|Henjō|qid=Q1035285|lt=Henjō|1=Henjō}}, waka poet, one of the {{ill|Rokkasen|en|Rokkasen|qid=Q1336997|lt=Six Immortal Poets|1=Rokkasen}} and {{ill|Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry|en|Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry|qid=Q671039|lt=Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry|1=Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry}} (b. {{ill|816|en|816|qid=Q29920|lt=816|1=816}}). * {{ill|Jōei|en|Jōei|qid=Q1194168|lt=Jōei|1=Jōei}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1232|en|1232|qid=Q5418|lt=1232|1=1232}} {{ill|February 11|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 11|qq=}}） – {{ill|Myōe|en|Myōe|qid=Q2026000|lt=Myōe|1=Myōe}}, revivalist of the {{ill|Huayan|en|Huayan|qid=Q1198075|lt=Kegon school|1=Huayan}} of Buddhism (b. {{ill|1173|en|1173|qid=Q19688|lt=1173|1=1173}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 13th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1728|en|1728|qid=Q6947|lt=1728|1=1728}} {{ill|February 28|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 28|qq=}}） – {{ill|Ogyū Sorai|en|Ogyū Sorai|qid=Q369158|lt=Ogyū Sorai|1=Ogyū Sorai}}, Confucian scholar of the Edo period (b. {{ill|1666|en|1666|qid=Q7585|lt=1666|1=1666}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|18|1|20|12|19|2|1|0119|qq=draft}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 1월 19일]] [[ja:1月19日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月十九]]
[[ar:January 19 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- None listed --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十九]] {{wikidata link|Q838901}} [[Category:Days 19 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
